task-1777854638779-n478dn.description: 1. V1 feature inventory: inspect explorer/ as read-only reference and build explorer-v2/docs/V1_FEATURE_PARITY_MATRIX.md with v1 feature, v2 target, implementation status, files, and acceptance checks.

task-1777854638784-iyb8o0.description: 2. Source coverage inventory: inspect v1 source fetchers/routes/services and build explorer-v2/docs/SOURCE_COVERAGE.md with source, domain, auth needs, pipeline state, DB target, API/frontend consumer.

task-1777854638887-95cray.description: 3. Database schema completion: ensure explorer-v2 database schemas cover weather, aviation, satellites, maritime, hazards, infrastructure, locations, source health, provenance, and future domain expansion.

task-1777854638891-vk2uvc.description: 4. Real-data pipeline completion: move Python pipelines beyond scaffold into fetch-normalize-validate-load patterns with raw audit and database-ready outputs.

task-1777854638900-h2r0ke.description: 5. Backend API and binary endpoints: expose /api/v2 domain APIs plus compact binary/vector transport endpoints for dense globe layers.

task-1777854638904-ne3ak3.description: 6. Frontend globe layer wiring: connect Cesium renderers to /api/v2 domain APIs and binary transport, replacing static-only behavior where possible.

task-1777854638906-34bwr5.description: 7. Panel/toggle wiring: wire UI mode panels, layer toggles, source health states, selections, and store state to real API data.

task-1777854638909-7gwws7.description: 8. Performance optimization: minimize overfetching, use compact vector/binary payloads, maintain stable frontend render loops, and document perf constraints.

task-1777854638912-pwxim2.description: 9. Tests/build validation: run and expand tests for backend APIs, pipelines, database schema, frontend build, and integration acceptance.

task-1777854638915-bkj2tt.description: 10. Documentation: update structure, onboarding, API contracts, migration, source coverage, parity matrix, and acceptance status docs for future chats.
